  init           Initialize a MSSQL database container

  destroy        Destroy the database container.

  create-db      Create databases specified in configuration on the server.

  load-schema    Execute SQL files provided in configuration against specified
                 database.

  reset          Execute SQL files provided in configuration against specified
                 database.

  help           Display more information on a specific command.

  version        Display version information.
